w:r.w:t: PortfolioAI is an AI-powered SaaS platform that enables professionals, students, freelancers, developers, designers, researchers, and job seekers to automatically generate, optimize, and publish professional portfolios. Leveraging large language models (LLMs), semantic search, and integrations with platforms such as GitHub, LinkedIn, Behance, and Google Scholar, PortfolioAI transforms raw user data and work history into compelling, recruiter-optimized portfolio websites, resumes, and career narratives.

The platform operates on a freemium model with premium subscriptions, AI credit packs, and white-label licensing. The core value proposition is speed and quality: a complete professional portfolio that would take days of manual effort is produced in minutes.
"Empower every professional to present their best self — automatically, intelligently, and beautifully."

PortfolioAI envisions a world where no talented person is overlooked because of poor self-presentation. The platform democratizes access to professional branding, making the quality of output previously available only through expensive human designers and copywriters accessible to anyone.
Building a professional portfolio is time-consuming
Professionals spend 10–40+ hours designing and writing portfolios
Generic website builders lack AI personalization
Resumes are rarely optimized for ATS systems
70%+ of resumes are rejected before human review
Resume checkers give feedback but don't auto-fix
Personal branding content is hard to write
Weak bios and project descriptions reduce interview callbacks
Skills and career gaps are hard to self-identify
Professionals lack objective insight into their competitiveness
Career coaches are inaccessible due to cost
Integrating data from multiple platforms is manual
GitHub, LinkedIn, Behance data sits siloed
No single platform unifies all professional data sources
Includes upskilling, coaching, and job-matching platforms
Creating high-intent demand for resume/portfolio tools
Highest growth segment for portfolio tools
Become the leading AI-powered portfolio and resume platform for professionals globally
Achieve 100,000 registered users within 12 months of launch
Establish integrations with the 8 major professional platforms
Junior software engineer, 1 yr exp, job hunting
No design skills; poor self-promotion ability
Slow case study writing; inconsistent branding
Business grad seeking first corporate role
No technical skills for website building
Uncertainty about what skills are missing
No work experience; doesn't know what to highlight
Generate a portfolio website from my GitHub and LinkedIn
I can share it with recruiters instantly
Create professional case studies for my projects
Clients understand the value I deliver
Import my GitHub repos and get auto-generated README and descriptions
My projects look professional without extra writing
Connect Behance/Dribbble and auto-build a visual portfolio site
I save hours of manual curation
Get my resume scored and rewritten for a specific job role
Generate a portfolio even without work experience
I can still showcase projects and skills
Import my Google Scholar publications into a portfolio
Academic collaborators and employers see my work
Receive a skills gap report and learning path
I know exactly what to study next
I can submit it via email or job portals
Set a custom domain for my portfolio
My site looks professional and branded
Monitor AI usage and moderation queue
I can prevent abuse and manage costs
View analytics on who viewed my portfolio
I can optimize my outreach strategy
Bio generation, project summaries, case studies, layout AI, branding recommendations, multi-template selection
ATS-optimized generation, multi-version support, job-role targeting, scoring, PDF/DOCX export
Competency scoring, skill gap analysis, learning path generation, employability estimation, certification recommendations
Project idea generation, README generation, documentation writing, architecture explanation, GitHub push
Static site generation, drag-and-drop editor, custom domains, responsive themes, SEO, analytics
NLP rewriting, tone optimization, LinkedIn/bio improvement, recruiter-optimized content
GitHub, LinkedIn, Behance, Dribbble, Medium, Google Scholar, Kaggle, Stack Overflow
Traffic analytics, recruiter engagement, resume performance, skill growth, AI improvement suggestions
User management, template management, AI credit management, subscription management, moderation
Freemium gating, Stripe/PayPal/Chapa billing, subscription lifecycle, AI credit packs, custom domain plans
AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit
WCAG 2.1 AA across all UI surfaces
English at launch; i18n architecture from day 1

User auth (social login), AI portfolio generator, resume builder with ATS scoring, PDF/DOCX export, GitHub integration, LinkedIn integration, template engine (5+ templates), freemium gating, Stripe payment, admin panel (basic), SEO-ready portfolio pages, mobile-responsive output

Behance/Dribbble integration, AI skill analyzer, career roadmap generation, custom domains, analytics dashboard, AI content improvement (bio/LinkedIn rewriting), Medium/Kaggle/SO integration, Google Scholar import, portfolio version history, AI project idea generator

Collaborative portfolios, AI interview coach, white-label plans, portfolio A/B testing, team/agency management, API access for developers, Chrome extension, mobile app (iOS/Android), multilingual portfolio generation, AI testimonial formatting
Blockchain credential verification, AR/VR portfolio experiences, AI video portfolio generation, enterprise SSO (Okta/SAML), full LMS integration, peer review marketplace
No AI career features, not portfolio-specific
AI-first, career-optimized, integrated with dev tools
No AI content gen, no resume/ATS features
AI content generation + ATS + GitHub integration
No portfolio site, no skill analysis
No AI career intelligence, no developer tools
No portfolio website, no AI writing
Standalone AI-built portfolio that complements LinkedIn
Limited AI, no resume builder, niche audience
Broader audience, AI-first, resume + portfolio unified
No portfolio site, no GitHub/Behance import
1 portfolio, 3 AI generations/month, 5 templates, subdomain only, PortfolioAI branding
Unlimited portfolios, 50 AI generations/month, 20+ templates, custom domain, PDF/DOCX export, analytics, priority support
Everything in Pro + unlimited AI generations, skill analyzer, career roadmap, all integrations, GitHub auto-sync, advanced analytics, white-label option
Pro+ features × 5 users, team dashboard, shared templates, admin controls, billing consolidation
SSO, dedicated infrastructure, SLA, custom integrations, onboarding, account manager
AI Credit Packs: $5 = 10 generations, $15 = 40 generations, $40 = 120 generations
Premium Template Marketplace: $5–$25 per template, 70/30 creator revenue share
Custom Domain Hosting Add-on: $5/month per domain (beyond plan inclusions)
Portfolio Review Service: $29 one-time AI-powered expert review report
API Access for Developers: $0.02 per AI generation call (B2B)
White-Label Licensing: $499/month for agencies to rebrand the platform
Users who log in at least once/month
Avg AI content generations per user
Token budgeting, caching repeated generations, rate limiting free tier, self-hosted model option for common tasks
Multi-model approach, human-in-loop review option, user feedback loop to retrain prompts
End-to-end encryption, zero-trust architecture, regular penetration testing, GDPR compliance
Speed to market, strong integrations, community building, unique career AI features
Strong free tier value, aggressive trial-to-paid nurturing, usage-based urgency triggers
Abstraction layer for integrations, graceful degradation, API change monitoring
Microservices from launch, auto-scaling infra, load testing before each major release
Legal counsel, AI disclosure labels, opt-out mechanisms, content policy team
Auth system, DB schema, CI/CD pipeline, base API, design system
AI portfolio gen, resume builder, 5 templates, GitHub integration, Stripe, subdomain hosting
Skill analyzer, LinkedIn/Behance integration, custom domains, analytics, career roadmap
All integrations, AI content improvement, team plans, white-label, advanced analytics
Enterprise tier, API marketplace, mobile app, AI interview coach, multilingual support

PortfolioAI is a multi-tenant, cloud-native SaaS platform composed of loosely coupled microservices. The system ingests user professional data from multiple sources, processes it through AI/ML pipelines, generates portfolio artifacts (websites, resumes, case studies), and delivers them through a CDN-hosted static site infrastructure. The platform exposes RESTful and GraphQL APIs for frontend consumption and third-party integration.
Creates/manages portfolio, imports integrations, uses AI features
Reads public portfolio pages, no account required
Manages users, templates, AI usage, subscriptions via admin panel
LLM API calls for content generation
Stripe, PayPal, Chapa for subscription and credit billing
GitHub, LinkedIn, Behance, Dribbble, Google Scholar, etc.
Serves static portfolio sites globally with edge caching
System shall support registration via email/password and social login (Google, GitHub, LinkedIn)
System shall enforce email verification before granting full account access
Optional for users, enforced for admins
System shall implement role-based access control with roles: Guest, Free User, Pro User, Admin, Super Admin
System shall allow users to manage their profile (name, avatar, bio, contact info)
System shall support account deletion with 30-day grace period and data export (GDPR Article 17)
System shall maintain audit logs of all user actions for 90 days
System shall support session management with configurable expiry (default: 7 days)
System shall enforce password policy: min 8 characters, complexity requirements, breach detection
System shall generate a complete portfolio from user-provided data in < 30 seconds (P95)
System shall support at minimum 5 portfolio templates at launch, expandable to 50+
System shall generate responsive HTML/CSS portfolio sites compatible with all modern browsers
System shall provide drag-and-drop section reordering for generated portfolios
System shall generate portfolio sites with Lighthouse scores: Performance > 90, SEO > 90, Accessibility > 90
System shall support subdomain hosting (username.portfolioai.com) for all users
System shall support custom domain mapping for Pro+ users with automatic HTTPS via Let's Encrypt
System shall maintain portfolio version history (last 10 versions) for rollback
System shall publish portfolios within 60 seconds of user confirmation
System shall support portfolio sections: Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Experience, Education, Publications, Testimonials, Contact
System shall generate professional bios of 100–500 words tailored to user role and industry
System shall generate project descriptions from repository name, README, and commit history
System shall generate case studies following the Problem-Solution-Outcome-Impact structure
System shall rewrite and optimize resume bullet points for ATS keyword density and impact
System shall generate LinkedIn summary improvements based on user profile data
System shall generate GitHub README files from project description and tech stack
System shall provide tone options for generated content: Professional, Creative, Technical, Academic
System shall maintain user-specific content style memory across sessions using embeddings
System shall support AI regeneration with feedback loop (thumbs up/down + custom instruction)
System shall enforce output filtering for inappropriate/harmful content using moderation API
System shall track token usage per user per billing cycle for quota enforcement
System shall cache identical generation requests for 24 hours to reduce API costs
System shall generate ATS-compatible resumes in PDF and DOCX format
System shall compute an ATS score (0–100) for each generated resume
System shall allow users to target a specific job description for resume optimization
System shall identify and suggest missing keywords from target job description
System shall support 10+ resume templates (chronological, functional, combination, creative)
System shall allow creation of multiple resume versions per user
System shall provide section-by-section improvement suggestions
System shall extract and parse uploaded existing resumes (PDF/DOCX) for editing
System shall flag potential red flags (employment gaps, job-hopping) with suggestions
Repos, languages, stars, commits, README, contribution graph
Work history, education, skills, endorsements, headline
System shall track and display portfolio page views, unique visitors, and session duration
System shall track referrer sources (LinkedIn share, direct, Google, recruiter link)
System shall track resume download events with timestamp and referrer
System shall display skill growth over time based on project additions
System shall provide AI-generated insights: 'Your Python projects get 3× more views than JavaScript'
System shall provide a recruiter engagement score based on interaction patterns
System shall respect visitor privacy (no personal PII collected from visitors, GDPR cookie consent)
Admin shall see platform-wide analytics: total portfolios, AI usage, revenue, churn, funnel
Used for social logins and API access grants
Short-lived access tokens (15min) + long-lived refresh tokens (7 days)
Refresh token store with automatic expiry
Role: Guest, Free, Pro, ProPlus, Admin, SuperAdmin
Optional for users; required for admins
Sliding window per IP + per user
100 req/min per IP; configurable per tier
Users, portfolios, resumes, billing, integrations, RBAC
ACID compliance, relational integrity, pgvector for embeddings
AI generation cache, template configs, portfolio JSON snapshots
Schema flexibility for varied portfolio structures
Sessions, rate limits, AI response cache, job queues
Sub-millisecond latency, pub/sub for async events
User embeddings, semantic skill matching, content similarity
Fast ANN search for personalization and recommendations
Full-text search across portfolios and templates
Low operational overhead for MVP, scale to Elasticsearch later
Portfolio assets, resume PDFs, user avatars, template files
Durable, cheap storage with CDN integration
Analytics events, performance metrics, AI usage logs
All data at rest must be encrypted using AES-256
All data in transit must use TLS 1.3 minimum
PII must be stored in GDPR-compliant EU or user-selected region
OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities must be mitigated before launch
Penetration testing must be conducted quarterly by external firm
Dependency vulnerability scanning must run on every CI/CD build
All secrets must be stored in AWS Secrets Manager / HashiCorp Vault, never in code
Rate limiting and DDoS protection at edge (Cloudflare WAF)
AI-generated content must pass moderation API before delivery to users
User-uploaded files must be scanned for malware before processing
Horizontal scaling: All stateless services must be deployable as multiple replicas behind a load balancer
Auto-scaling: Kubernetes HPA must scale pods based on CPU (> 70%) and queue depth (> 500 jobs)
Database scaling: Read replicas for PostgreSQL (up to 5), connection pooling via PgBouncer
AI job scaling: Worker pool auto-scaling from 5 to 100 workers based on queue depth
CDN: Cloudflare caches portfolio static assets globally; cache hit rate target > 90%
Multi-region: Active-active deployment in us-east-1 and eu-west-1 for latency and DR
Docker image build, push to registry
Helm upgrade to staging cluster, smoke tests
Load test on staging, compare baseline
Blue-green deploy, auto rollback on error rate spike
PortfolioAI is built as a cloud-native microservices platform following a layered architecture pattern: Client Tier → API Gateway → Service Mesh → AI/ML Pipeline → Data Tier → CDN Delivery.
Web app, mobile browsers, public portfolio sites
WAF, DDoS protection, CDN, static portfolio hosting
Request routing, auth validation, rate limiting, observability
Kong Gateway or AWS API Gateway
Core business logic in independent deployable units
LLM orchestration, prompt management, vector operations
Component library built on Radix UI + Tailwind
Server state: React Query; Client state: Zustand
Session handling, token refresh, protected routes
Type-safe API calls with automatic retries
Each generated portfolio is a statically exported Next.js site, stored on Cloudflare R2, and served via Cloudflare CDN. The rendering pipeline is:
User confirms portfolio content → API triggers static site generation job
Generation service renders Handlebars/JSX templates with user data → produces HTML/CSS/JS bundle
Bundle is uploaded to R2 bucket under user's namespace: r2://portfolios/{userId}/{version}/
Cloudflare Pages deployment API is called to publish the new version
DNS record (username.portfolioai.com) points to Cloudflare Pages edge
Custom domains: user's CNAME configured → Cloudflare SSL provisioned automatically
User profile, preferences, subscription state, RBAC
Portfolio CRUD, version history, publishing, section management
LLM prompt orchestration, LangChain chains, content generation queue
Resume CRUD, PDF/DOCX generation, ATS scoring
OAuth flows + data ingestion for GitHub, LinkedIn, Behance, etc.
Skill extraction, gap analysis, career roadmap generation
Event ingestion, portfolio analytics, admin metrics
Stripe/PayPal/Chapa subscriptions, webhooks, AI credit ledger
Admin panel APIs, user management, moderation, config
Static site generation, template rendering, Cloudflare deploy
Versioned: /api/v1/... JSON responses, standardized error codes
Portfolio editor, complex data fetching with field selection
Apollo Server, persisted queries, DataLoader for N+1 prevention
Socket.IO over WSS, room-based subscriptions per user
Protocol Buffers, streaming for long AI jobs
Main content generation: bios, case studies, project descriptions
Quick operations: ATS scoring, keyword extraction, short suggestions
Prompt chaining, memory, agent actions, tool calls
Version-controlled prompts, A/B testing, performance tracking
User skill embeddings, portfolio similarity, semantic matching
ANN search for recommendations and personalization
Structured JSON output from LLM for reliable processing
Exact-match and semantic-similarity cache to reduce API costs
Domain-specific tone adaptation from user feedback (Phase 3)
User initiates generation request (e.g., 'Generate my bio')
Request arrives at ai-orchestrator via REST or job queue
Orchestrator fetches user context: profile data, integrated platform data, existing content
Context is assembled into a structured prompt using the PromptRegistry template
Semantic cache checked — if hit, return cached response (< 100ms)
If cache miss: LLM API called (OpenAI) with structured prompt + few-shot examples
Output parsed with Pydantic model — validated for length, format, and completeness
Content moderation API checks output for policy violations
Result stored in MongoDB cache with 24h TTL and delivered to client via WebSocket update
User feedback (thumbs up/down) stored in feedback table for prompt optimization
Collect user's skills from LinkedIn, GitHub languages, Stack Overflow tags
Map varied skill names to canonical skill taxonomy
Infer proficiency level from project count, contribution recency, endorsements
Embed user skill vector in high-dimensional space
Compare user embedding to target role embeddings from job postings dataset
Generate learning path, certification suggestions, project ideas via LLM
Composite score (0–100) based on skills, experience, portfolio completeness
Gradient boosted model or rule-based formula
Multi-region active-active for DR and latency
Managed Kubernetes; node groups per workload type
mTLS between services, traffic shaping, circuit breaking
Automatic rotation for DB creds, API keys
Portfolio hosting, WAF, DDoS, global edge
S3 for backups/assets; R2 for CDN-served portfolio files
Portfolio subdomain wildcard + custom domain CNAME
auth, user, portfolio, payment, admin services
Soft delete for GDPR grace period
User selects plan on pricing page → frontend calls payment-service /checkout
payment-service creates Stripe Checkout Session with plan price ID and user metadata
User completes payment on Stripe-hosted checkout page
Stripe webhook (stripe.checkout.session.completed) fires → payment-service processes event
payment-service updates user subscription_status and role in PostgreSQL
Event published to internal message bus → user-service updates permissions, notification-service sends confirmation email
For AI credits: credit ledger entry created; credits_remaining incremented in users table
Primary global billing (cards, Apple/Google Pay, bank transfers)

Portfolio view events, resume download events, and user interaction events flow through a lightweight event ingestion API (analytics-service) that writes to TimescaleDB. A pre-built Grafana dashboard provides admin visibility. User-facing analytics are served via pre-aggregated views refreshed every 5 minutes.
Client fires event (e.g., portfolio_view) with metadata (user_id, visitor_id, referrer, country)
Event hits analytics-service /ingest endpoint (high-throughput, no auth required for public events)
Events are buffered in Redis list, batch-written to TimescaleDB every 10 seconds
Continuous aggregates (hypertables) compute hourly/daily rollups automatically
analytics-service API serves pre-aggregated data to user dashboard (cached 5 min in Redis)
JWT validation, rate limiting, IP allowlisting for admin
Input validation, output encoding, SQL parameterization
Encrypted at rest, least-privilege roles per service, row-level security
No secrets in code or env files, automatic rotation
Moderation API filtering, user content sandboxing
GDPR data residency, cookie consent, right to erasure
Automated alerting, runbooks, incident war room
SSR/SSG, RSC, excellent SEO, Vercel/edge deploy
Type safety, better DX, fewer runtime errors
Lightweight client state + powerful server state
REST for CRUD; GraphQL for flexible data queries
Mature LLM chains, agents, memory, caching
Best quality for professional content generation
Managed, scalable, simple SDK for ANN search
Flexible schema for portfolio JSON, template configs
Sessions, job queues, AI response cache
Headless Chrome for pixel-perfect resume PDFs
S3 for backups; R2 for CDN-served portfolio assets
The project uses a monorepo managed by Turborepo (or Nx), separating frontend apps, backend microservices, shared packages, and infrastructure code.
Next.js frontend application (main dashboard + portfolio editor)
FastAPI skill analysis and career AI service
NestJS event ingestion and analytics API
TypeScript types shared across frontend and backend
Terraform IaC (AWS EKS, RDS, S3, etc.)
Architecture diagrams, ADRs, API specs (OpenAPI YAML)
Developer utility scripts (DB seed, local dev setup)
2–20 replicas per service; RollingUpdate strategy (maxSurge: 25%, maxUnavailable: 0)
CPU threshold: 70%; queue depth threshold for workers; min/max replicas per service
minAvailable: 1 for all critical services during node maintenance
CPU request/limit, memory request/limit defined per service in Helm values
HTTP GET /ready every 5s; service removed from LB if not ready
Default deny-all; explicit allow rules for each service pair
Non-sensitive config (feature flags, model names, rate limits)
Injected from AWS Secrets Manager via External Secrets Operator
New version built and pushed to ECR by GitHub Actions
ArgoCD detects new image tag in Helm values (via automated PR by CI)
ArgoCD deploys new version alongside existing (blue=current, green=new)
Flagger runs automated canary analysis: error rate < 1%, p99 latency < target
Traffic gradually shifted: 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% green over 10 minutes
If error spike detected: automatic rollback to blue within 60 seconds
Post-deploy: Datadog synthetic monitors run, alert if any fail
DNS failover to eu-west-1 warm standby via Route53 health check
Restore from hourly RDS snapshot; WAL replay to point-in-time
Recreate EKS cluster from Terraform + ArgoCD re-deploy all services
Switch DNS to AWS CloudFront fallback origin
Circuit breaker activates; fallback to Anthropic Claude API
Set up infrastructure, CI/CD, base APIs, design system
Monorepo setup, K8s cluster, DB schema v1, auth service live, design system deployed
Core AI portfolio gen, resume builder, GitHub integration, Stripe, 5 templates
Public beta, 1,000 beta users, portfolio gen working, resume export working
LinkedIn/Behance, skill analyzer, custom domains, analytics, career roadmap
2,000 MAU, 5% paid conversion, all core integrations live
All integrations, AI content improvement, team plans, white-label
Enterprise tier, API marketplace, mobile app, AI interview coach
Week 1: Feature development, unit testing, design review
Week 2: Integration testing, QA, performance review, staging deploy
End of sprint: Demo to stakeholders, retrospective, backlog grooming
Every 4th sprint: Security review, dependency updates, tech debt sprint
Roadmap, user stories, stakeholder communication, metrics
Design system, user flows, template design, accessibility
Next.js app, portfolio editor, template system, analytics UI
LangChain orchestration, prompt engineering, skill analyzer, embeddings
Test strategy, automation, performance testing, security scanning
Architecture decisions, code review, cross-team coordination
Simulate job interviews with AI, provide feedback on answers, suggest improvement areas
User speaks about their experience; AI transcribes, structures, and generates portfolio content
Provide real-time salary data and negotiation scripts based on user role and location
Accept screenshots/designs as input; AI describes the design decisions and UX reasoning
Match user portfolio style and content to specific company culture and recruiter preferences
AI monitors job market trends and automatically suggests portfolio updates based on in-demand skills
Match users with mentors based on skill gap analysis and career goal alignment using vector similarity
Generate and maintain portfolios in 20+ languages using LLM translation + localization
Generate tailored cover letters per job application, synced with resume and portfolio
Issue verifiable digital credentials (achievements, skills) on-chain for recruiter verification
Train custom models on portfolio/career data for better quality than generic GPT-4o
Match user portfolio embeddings to job postings embeddings for direct application recommendations
Test two portfolio versions simultaneously; AI analyzes which version gets more recruiter engagement
Allow developers/designers to embed interactive 3D/AR demos directly in portfolio
Analyze user's LinkedIn network and suggest warm introductions for job opportunities
